case_title: ANGELA NIBBS VS. MOKI MOBILITY, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST AND ORDER TO SERVE THE CALIFORNIA SECRETARY OF STATE - GRANTED FILED BY PLAINTIFF NIBBS, ANGELA AS TO DEFENDANT MOKI MOBILITY, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,475.00 FILED BY NIBBS, ANGELA AS TO DEFENDANT MOKI MOBILITY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
